data.content: # Revised Implementation Plan v2: Streamline Scanned-Agent Rows and Button Styling ## Review Feedback Addressed 1. **Replacement add control**: The per-row Add and Add All buttons are replaced by a single section-level "Add Selected" button in the ScannedAgentsList header. It imports all multi-selected models across all agents in one action. 2. **Codex rename scope**: Explicit list of all provider-id consumers beyond agent-identity.ts. --- ## 1. Rename OpenAI â†’ Codex (`src/lib/agent-identity.ts`) ### Type-level change - `AgentProviderId` union: `"openai"` â†’ `"codex"` (line 6) - `PROVIDER_LABELS`: key `openai: "OpenAI"` â†’ `codex: "Codex"` (line 32) ### Detection logic - `detectAgentProviderId()` (line 78): return `"codex"` instead of `"openai"` for codex/chatgpt/openai commands ### Display label changes - `providerLabel()` (line 84): No change needed â€” it reads PROVIDER_LABELS dynamically. - `normalizeAgentIdentity()` (line 251): Change `provider === "OpenAI"` guard to `provider === "Codex"`. This branch calls `normalizeCodexModel` â€” function name already correct. - `normalizeCopilotModel()` (line 182): Change `provider: "OpenAI"` return to `provider: "Codex"` for GPT/Codex sub-models routed through Copilot. - `formatAgentFamily()` (line 330): Change `provider === "OpenAI"` guard to `provider === "Codex"`. ### Consumers outside agent-identity.ts (explicit scope) | File | What to change | |------|---------------| | `src/components/agent-info-bar.tsx` line 19 | `VENDOR_CONFIG` key `openai` â†’ `codex` | | `src/hooks/use-agent-info.ts` line 23 | `vendor` field comment: cosmetic only, `detectVendor` returns the new `"codex"` id automatically | | `src/components/__tests__/lease-audit-view-helpers.test.ts` | Uses `"openai"` as raw provider string in test data fixtures (e.g. line 95). These are stored data values, NOT the AgentProviderId type â€” **leave unchanged** unless the data normalization pipeline also renames stored values (it doesn't). | | `src/lib/__tests__/agent-identity.test.ts` | Update test expectations for `detectAgentProviderId` calls that expect `"openai"` to now expect `"codex"`. | --- ## 2. State Shape Change (`src/components/settings-agents-hooks.tsx`) ### `useAgentScanner` (line 51) - Change `selectedScannedOptions` type: `Record` â†’ `Record` - Initialize with arrays: `agent.selectedOptionId ?? agent.options?.[0]?.id` wrapped in `[...]` - Return type updates accordingly. ### `resolveSelectedOption` â†’ `resolveSelectedOptions` (`src/components/settings-agents-scanned.tsx` line 57) - New signature: `(scanned: ScannedAgent, selectedOptions: Record) â†’ ScannedAgentOption[]` - Returns array of resolved options matching the selected IDs. - Keep a compat helper `resolveFirstSelectedOption` for any callers that need a single option. ### `useAgentMutations` (line 160) - `handleAddScanned` (line 166): Accepts a list of `{agent, options}` tuples. Loops over each, calling `addAgent()` per option. Sets first added as default. - `handleAddAll` (line 201): **Remove entirely** â€” replaced by the same `handleAddScanned` accepting multi-agent input. - `addAllAgents` helper (line 112): Refactor to accept multi-select shape â€” loop agents Ă— selected options. - `buildAgentPayload` (line 35): Unchanged â€” still builds payload from one `(scanned, selected)` pair. --- ## 3. ScannedAgentsList UI Changes (`src/components/settings-agents-scanned.tsx`) ### 3a. Remove Add All button (lines 114-124) - Remove the `onAddAll` prop entirely. - Remove the `unregisteredInstalled` computation (lines 96-105) â€” no longer needed for button visibility. ### 3b. Add section-level "Add Selected" button - Place in the header row (where Add All was), visible when any model is selected across any unregistered agent. - Styled with `variant="success"` (emerald-600 bg, emerald-300 border) per button color spec. - On click: calls new `onAddSelected()` prop which collects all selected models across all agents and imports them. - Label: "Add Selected" with Plus icon, or "Add Selected (N)" showing count. ### 3c. Remove per-row Add button and registered pill (lines 322-339) - Remove `onAdd` prop from `ScannedAgentRow`. - Remove `isRegistered` prop from `ScannedAgentRow`. - Remove both conditional blocks (Add button lines 322-331, registered badge lines 332-339). ### 3d. Show full CLI path under agent name (lines 305-312) - Replace the truncated Badge with a plain `` subtitle: ```tsx {agent.path} ``` - Keep the "not found" badge for `!agent.installed`. - Layout: stack agent name and path vertically in a `flex-col` container. ### 3e. Remove agent.id span (line 363) - Delete `{agent.id}` from `renderOptionSelector`. ### 3f. Convert to multi-select with pill badges - Replace both `SearchableOptionCombobox` and `
